title: Abivax shares surge as worries subside over immune drug's cancer risk
summary: Abivax shares surged nearly 40% after supplementary Phase 3 data showed obefazimod's malignancy rates across trials were no higher than background levels for ulcerative colitis patients, clearing a key investor safety concern. Exposure-adjusted incidence rate analysis covering over 1,700 patient-years found no real malignancy signal above the baseline UC population. Abivax plans to submit an FDA approval application by end of 2026 and recently raised $800 million through a U.S. share sale.
